description: Three.js bone rotation snaps instantly, resulting in robotic motion.
root_cause: Linear keyframe interpolation was used instead of spherical linear interpolation (SLERP).
fix: Implement Quaternion SLERP inside useFrame loops to blend joint paths.
avoidance_rule: Avoid linear rotation calculations on armature joints.

description: React state triggers infinite re-render loops inside R3F hooks.
root_cause: Component state setters were called inside useFrame loop.
fix: Use React refs instead of local state hooks to update mesh positions and rotations dynamically.
avoidance_rule: Never call useState setters inside the R3F useFrame render loop.

description: GLB model loads blank in web canvas with no textures.
root_cause: Texture files were referenced by absolute absolute local paths in Blender instead of relative embedded layout.
fix: Pack textures directly inside the GLB container during Blender export.
avoidance_rule: Always embed textures directly inside the GLB model binary.
